chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Necessitates Discretionary Punishment, Legal Punishment, Stoning, Execution, and Exile in Adultery

text: 5041 - وَ رَوَى جَمِيلٌ عَنْ زُرَارَةَ عَنْ أَحَدِهِمَا عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي رَجُلٍ غَصَبَ اِمْرَأَةً مُسْلِمَةً نَفْسَهَا قَالَ "يُقْتَلُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5041 - Jamil narrated from Zurarah, from one of the Imams (peace be upon them), regarding a man who forcibly violated a Muslim woman.
Imam (as) said: "He is to be killed."
